meaning: Systematic errors in AI systems that produce unfair or discriminatory outcomes due to biased training data or design.
definition: Systematic errors in AI systems that produce unfair or discriminatory outcomes due to biased training data or design.
example: The hiring algorithm had to be retrained after researchers discovered algorithmic bias against female applicants.
exampleHindi: शोधकर्ताओं द्वारा महिला आवेदकों के प्रति एल्गोरिथम पूर्वाग्रह की खोज के बाद भर्ती एल्गोरिदम को फिर से प्रशिक्षित करना पड़ा।

meaning: The use of algorithms and data-driven systems to monitor, evaluate, and direct workers' activities.
definition: The use of algorithms and data-driven systems to monitor, evaluate, and direct workers' activities.
example: Delivery drivers operating under algorithmic management have little control over their own schedules.
exampleHindi: एल्गोरिथम प्रबंधन के तहत काम करने वाले डिलीवरी ड्राइवरों का अपने शेड्यूल पर बहुत कम नियंत्रण होता है।

meaning: The simulation of human intelligence processes by machines, enabling them to learn, reason, and make decisions.
definition: The simulation of human intelligence processes by machines, enabling them to learn, reason, and make decisions.
example: AI-powered chatbots now handle the majority of routine customer service inquiries instantly.
exampleHindi: एआई-संचालित चैटबॉट अब अधिकांश नियमित ग्राहक सेवा पूछताछ को तुरंत संभाल लेते हैं।

meaning: A design philosophy that uses AI to enhance and support human decision-making rather than replace humans entirely.
definition: A design philosophy that uses AI to enhance and support human decision-making rather than replace humans entirely.
example: Radiologists use augmented intelligence tools to detect anomalies faster while retaining final diagnostic authority.
exampleHindi: रेडियोलॉजिस्ट अंतिम निदान प्राधिकार को बरकरार रखते हुए विसंगतियों का तेजी से पता लगाने के लिए संवर्धित खुफिया उपकरणों का उपयोग करते हैं।

meaning: The use of technology to perform tasks with minimal human intervention, replacing or augmenting manual processes.
definition: à¤¸à¥à¤µà¤šà¤¾à¤²à¤¨
example: Automation of invoice processing saved the accounting team over 20 hours of manual work per week.
exampleHindi: चालान प्रसंस्करण के स्वचालन से लेखांकन टीम को प्रति सप्ताह 20 घंटे से अधिक मैन्युअल कार्य की बचत हुई।

meaning: The psychological fear or worry experienced by workers concerned that their jobs will be replaced by machines or AI.
definition: The psychological fear or worry experienced by workers concerned that their jobs will be replaced by machines or AI.
example: Automation anxiety was widespread in the warehouse after management announced a new robotic fulfilment system.
exampleHindi: प्रबंधन द्वारा एक नई रोबोटिक पूर्ति प्रणाली की घोषणा के बाद गोदाम में स्वचालन संबंधी चिंता व्यापक थी।

meaning: A workforce in which human workers are enhanced and empowered by AI and advanced technology to perform at higher levels.
definition: A workforce in which human workers are enhanced and empowered by AI and advanced technology to perform at higher levels.
example: The consulting firm envisioned a bionic workforce where every consultant is supported by an AI-powered research assistant.
exampleHindi: परामर्श फर्म ने एक बायोनिक कार्यबल की कल्पना की, जहां प्रत्येक सलाहकार को एआई-संचालित अनुसंधान सहायक द्वारा समर्थित किया जाता है।

meaning: A robot designed to work safely alongside humans in shared workspaces, assisting rather than replacing them.
definition: A robot designed to work safely alongside humans in shared workspaces, assisting rather than replacing them.
example: Factory workers now operate alongside co-bots that handle heavy lifting while humans manage quality control.
exampleHindi: फ़ैक्टरी कर्मचारी अब सह-बॉटों के साथ काम करते हैं जो भारी सामान उठाने का काम संभालते हैं जबकि मनुष्य गुणवत्ता नियंत्रण का प्रबंधन करते हैं।

meaning: Advanced automation that mimics human thought processes such as reasoning, judgement, and understanding language.
definition: Advanced automation that mimics human thought processes such as reasoning, judgement, and understanding language.
example: Cognitive automation tools can now draft legal summaries, reducing the workload of junior associates.
exampleHindi: संज्ञानात्मक स्वचालन उपकरण अब कानूनी सारांश तैयार कर सकते हैं, जिससे कनिष्ठ सहयोगियों का कार्यभार कम हो जाएगा।

meaning: The practice of basing business decisions on analysis and interpretation of data rather than intuition alone.
definition: The practice of basing business decisions on analysis and interpretation of data rather than intuition alone.
example: Data-driven decision making has reduced costly errors in their supply chain planning process.
exampleHindi: डेटा-संचालित निर्णय लेने से उनकी आपूर्ति श्रृंखला योजना प्रक्रिया में महंगी त्रुटियां कम हो गई हैं।

meaning: The integration of digital technology into all areas of a business, fundamentally changing how it operates and delivers value.
definition: The integration of digital technology into all areas of a business, fundamentally changing how it operates and delivers value.
example: The company's digital transformation journey involved adopting cloud computing and AI-driven analytics.
exampleHindi: कंपनी की डिजिटल परिवर्तन यात्रा में क्लाउड कंप्यूटिंग और एआई-संचालित एनालिटिक्स को अपनाना शामिल था।

meaning: Artificial intelligence systems capable of creating original text, images, code, and other content in response to user prompts.
definition: Artificial intelligence systems capable of creating original text, images, code, and other content in response to user prompts.
example: Generative AI tools like ChatGPT are now used for drafting emails, reports, and marketing content.
exampleHindi: चैटजीपीटी जैसे जेनरेटिव एआई टूल का उपयोग अब ईमेल, रिपोर्ट और मार्केटिंग सामग्री का मसौदा तैयार करने के लिए किया जाता है।

meaning: A strategy to automate as many business processes as possible using a combination of AI, machine learning, and RPA.
definition: A strategy to automate as many business processes as possible using a combination of AI, machine learning, and RPA.
example: Their hyperautomation initiative reduced operational costs by 35% in under a year.
exampleHindi: उनकी हाइपरऑटोमेशन पहल ने एक वर्ष से कम समय में परिचालन लागत में 35% की कमी की।

meaning: The combination of AI and automation technologies to create systems capable of performing complex, end-to-end processes.
definition: The combination of AI and automation technologies to create systems capable of performing complex, end-to-end processes.
example: Intelligent automation is transforming how insurance claims are processed, approved, and paid.
exampleHindi: इंटेलिजेंट ऑटोमेशन बीमा दावों को संसाधित करने, अनुमोदित करने और भुगतान करने के तरीके को बदल रहा है।

meaning: A network of physical objects embedded with sensors, software, and connectivity that enables them to collect and exchange data.
definition: A network of physical objects embedded with sensors, software, and connectivity that enables them to collect and exchange data.
example: In smart offices, IoT devices adjust lighting and temperature based on occupancy levels throughout the day.
exampleHindi: स्मार्ट कार्यालयों में, IoT उपकरण पूरे दिन अधिभोग स्तर के आधार पर प्रकाश और तापमान को समायोजित करते हैं।

meaning: The loss of employment caused when automation, technology, or economic shifts eliminate certain roles or industries.
definition: The loss of employment caused when automation, technology, or economic shifts eliminate certain roles or industries.
example: Job displacement in manufacturing has accelerated as robots take over assembly line tasks.
exampleHindi: विनिर्माण क्षेत्र में नौकरियों का विस्थापन तेज हो गया है क्योंकि रोबोट असेंबली लाइन कार्यों को अपने हाथ में ले रहे हैं।

meaning: A phenomenon where job growth occurs at the high-skill and low-skill ends of the labour market while middle-skill jobs decline.
definition: A phenomenon where job growth occurs at the high-skill and low-skill ends of the labour market while middle-skill jobs decline.
example: Labour market polarisation has eroded stable, middle-income careers in manufacturing and routine office work.
exampleHindi: श्रम बाजार ध्रुवीकरण ने विनिर्माण और नियमित कार्यालय कार्य में स्थिर, मध्यम आय वाले करियर को नष्ट कर दिया है।

meaning: A subset of AI where systems automatically learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed.
example: The recruitment software uses machine learning to screen thousands of CVs within seconds.
exampleHindi: भर्ती सॉफ्टवेयर सेकंड के भीतर हजारों सीवी को स्क्रीन करने के लिए मशीन लर्निंग का उपयोग करता है।

meaning: The practice of designing and refining inputs to AI language models in order to produce desired, high-quality outputs.
definition: The practice of designing and refining inputs to AI language models in order to produce desired, high-quality outputs.
example: Prompt engineering has emerged as a sought-after skill as organisations integrate AI into their workflows.
exampleHindi: जैसे-जैसे संगठन एआई को अपने वर्कफ़्लो में एकीकृत करते हैं, प्रॉम्प्ट इंजीनियरिंग एक मांग वाले कौशल के रूप में उभरी है।

meaning: Technology that uses software robots to automate repetitive, rule-based business tasks previously performed by humans.
definition: Technology that uses software robots to automate repetitive, rule-based business tasks previously performed by humans.
example: The bank deployed RPA to automate data entry, dramatically reducing processing errors.
exampleHindi: बैंक ने डेटा प्रविष्टि को स्वचालित करने के लिए आरपीए तैनात किया, जिससे प्रसंस्करण त्रुटियों में नाटकीय रूप से कमी आई।

meaning: A highly digitised manufacturing plant where machines, systems, and processes are interconnected and monitored through IoT and AI.
definition: A highly digitised manufacturing plant where machines, systems, and processes are interconnected and monitored through IoT and AI.
example: The smart factory uses real-time sensor data to predict equipment failures before they disrupt production.
exampleHindi: स्मार्ट फैक्ट्री उत्पादन को बाधित करने से पहले उपकरण विफलताओं की भविष्यवाणी करने के लिए वास्तविक समय सेंसर डेटा का उपयोग करती है।
